b:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Semantic Memory stores structured relationships between entities as subject-predicate-object triples with temporal validity tracking. It's managed by the separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Each triple has:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Subject"}],": The entity being described (e.g., \"user\")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Predicate"}],": The relationship (e.g., \"prefers\")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Object"}],": The value (e.g., \"neovim\")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]," (optional): When this fact became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," (optional): When it stopped being true (for historical facts)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts are stored in tables indexed by subject+predicate for fast lookup. Temporal validity means you can query \"what did Alice prefer last month?\" and get correct historical answers."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Triple CRUD"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Store a fact\nmnemosyne_triple_add(\n  subject=\"alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers\",\n  object=\"neovim\"\n)\n\n# Set temporal range\nmnemosyne_triple_add(\n  subject=\"bob\",\n  predicate=\"role\",\n  object=\"engineer\",\n  valid_from=\"2025-06-01\"\n)\n\n# Invalidate a fact (it stays in history)\nmnemosyne_invalidate(\n  memory_id=\"<id_of_triple>\"\n)\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Querying"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# All facts about Alice\nmnemosyne_triple_query(subject=\"alice\")\n\n# What does Alice prefer?\nmnemosyne_triple_query(subject=\"alice\", predicate=\"prefers\")\n\n# Who prefers Neovim?\nmnemosyne_triple_query(predicate=\"prefers\", object=\"neovim\")\n\n# As of a specific date\nmnemosyne_triple_query(\n  subject=\"bob\",\n  predicate=\"role\",\n  valid_at=\"2025-07-15\"\n)\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"When to Use Semantic vs. Episodic"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What it stores"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Explicit facts (S→P→O)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Implicit learnings from conversations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"How it's queried"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Direct lookup by subject/predicate"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic vector search"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal precision"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact validity windows"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Approximate (recency weighting)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best for"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Known facts, preferences, roles"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Inferred learnings, conversation context"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory is complementary to Episodic Memory. Use triples for things you know explicitly (Alice's preferences, Bob's role, company policies). Use episodic/implicit memory for things you learned from context but can't name precisely."}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Graph Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The semantic knowledge graph can be traversed with graph tools:"}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7"],["$L8"],"$L9"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"D65-DGFZ3wussYS9_Hf9h"}
5:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Link two memories with a semantic edge\nmnemosyne_graph_link(\n  source_id=\"mem_abc123\",\n  target_id=\"mem_def456\",\n  relationship=\"references\",\n  weight=0.8\n)\n\n# Traverse from a seed memory\nmnemosyne_graph_query(\n  seed_memory_id=\"mem_abc123\",\n  max_hops=2,\n  min_weight=0.5\n)\n","language":"bash"}]
6:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}]
7:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/memory-systems/temporal-graph","children":"Temporal Graph"}]," — Deeper dive into the triple model"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/graph-search","children":"Graph Search"}]," — Graph traversal and semantic linking tools (",["$","code",null,{"children":"graph_query"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"graph_link"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/memory-systems/episodic","children":"Episodic Memory"}]," — The implicit learning counterpart"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/memory-systems/memory-banks","children":"Memory Banks"}]," — Scoped memory isolation"]}],"\n"]}]
